reviews.review_description: I love this game, theirs so much things to do, and just imagine if theirs people playing it 24/7 it would be even better. This game is peak just like the anime, One Piece.

I definitely see the vision with this game and i think the devs have a unique style, however with a few touchups and bug fixes this game could be really quite interesting, im talking map design, textures and a solid mechanic to set it apart from the rest of the gorilla tag like games and if you need some help devs,just call me up.

This game is so fun, it's a fun game where you can play with, your friends, family, and your pets. This game was made by one of my friends Atomic, and it is his first game he ever made, so you might think it's trash but just wait, because in the future this game is going to be better than it ever was.

developer_response.body:
Wow, thank you so much for your kind words and support! It means a lot that you’re enjoying the game and sharing it with friends, family, and even pets. We put a lot of heart into this first project, and your encouragement really motivates him to make it even better. Stay tuned—there’s plenty more fun coming your way!

-AtomicVR100

reviews.review_description: Very fun game, amazing developers that work on bugs and glitches on the game, very active team of people. Lowkey More players would be needed to make the game even better :)
